message:
fix(ci): normalize process.platform on macOS + fix VFS Windows drive paths

- process.platform: strip version suffix from OSTYPE env var so
  "darwin24.0" becomes "darwin" (matching os.platform()), fixing
  test os_platform_matches_process_platform on macOS CI
- VFS normalizePath: detect Windows drive-letter paths (C:/...) as
  absolute, and preserve drive letter prefix in output instead of
  prepending "/" (which produces invalid /D:/... paths), fixing
  readFileSync ENOENT for extensions that resolve files relative to
  import.meta.url on Windows

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
